steps.title: Apply the rearrangement from the given condition
steps.content: Move the $(4-7x)$ terms to one side: $9-5=8(4-7x)-9(4-7x)$, giving $4=-(4-7x)$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $-4$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $-4$.
